questionHtml: State, giving a reason, the shape of the dinitrogen monoxide molecule.
markschemeHtml:
linear AND 2 electron domains

OR

linear AND 2 regions of electron density    [✔]

 

Note: Accept “two bonds AND no lone pairs” for reason.

meta.title: State, giving a reason, the shape of the dinitrogen monoxide molecule.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure

Structure 2.2.4—The valence shell electron pair repulsion (VSEPR) model enables the shapes of molecules to be predicted from the repulsion of electron domains around a central atom. Predict the electron domain geometry and the molecular geometry for species with up to four electron domains.
